case_title: PEREZ ELIZABETH VS SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET MGR CARMICHAEL STEVE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET MGR CARMICHAEL STEVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ ELIZABETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET MGR CARMICHAEL STEVE PLT.TO TAKE NOTHING ON CLAIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
